nasb.text: Watch yourselves, that you do not lose what we have accomplished, but that you may receive a full reward.

esv.text: Watch yourselves, so that you may not lose what we have worked for, but may win a full reward.

cnv.text: 你們要小心，不要拆毀我們已經完成的工作，卻要得著美滿的賞賜。

ccb.text: 你们要谨慎，好得到完满的赏赐，免得我们前功尽弃。

csbs.text: 你们自己要当心，免得失去我们大家为之所做的工，而要得着你们完满的报偿。
